items.title_en: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye targets U.S. robotaxi launch in 2027
items.title_zh: 自动驾驶技术供应商 Mobileye 计划于 2027 年在美国推出机器人出租车
items.desc_en: Self-driving technology supplier Mobileye Global announced it would launch its own robotaxi service Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 自动驾驶技术供应商 Mobileye Global 宣布将于周二推出自己的机器人出租车服务。

items.title_en: Novig wins CFTC approval as competition intensifies in sports prediction markets
items.title_zh: 随着体育预测市场竞争的加剧，Novig 获得 CFTC 批准
items.desc_en: Novig is building a peer-to-peer sports trading platform that allows users to trade directly against one another rather than bet against the house.
items.desc_zh: Novig 正在构建一个点对点体育交易平台，允许用户直接相互交易，而不是与庄家对赌。

items.title_en: Venezuela signs deal with US energy giant to rebuild power grid
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉与美国能源巨头签署重建电网协议
items.desc_en: The deal with General Electric is the latest sign of co-operation between US firms and Venezuela's interim government.
items.desc_zh: 与通用电气的交易是美国公司与委内瑞拉临时政府合作的最新迹象。

items.title_en: New Wharton forecast puts Social Security trust fund depletion later than official projections
items.title_zh: 沃顿商学院的新预测显示，社会保障信托基金的耗尽时间晚于官方预测
items.desc_en: Social Security's retirement trust fund may dry up in February 2033, according to a new report from the Penn Wharton Budget Model shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 根据宾夕法尼亚大学沃顿商学院预算模型向 CNBC 独家分享的一份新报告，社会保障的退休信托基金可能会在 2033 年 2 月枯竭。

items.title_en: Trump signals he could send details of Iran deal to Congress
items.title_zh: 特朗普暗示他可以向国会提交伊朗协议的细节
items.desc_en: The peace deal announced Sunday is meeting lukewarm reactions from Congress, including some allies of President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 周日宣布的和平协议遭到国会反应冷淡，其中包括唐纳德·特朗普总统的一些盟友。

items.title_en: SpaceX locks in $60 billion Cursor deal to close gap with rivals in AI coding race - Reuters
items.title_zh: SpaceX 锁定 600 亿美元 Cursor 交易，缩小与人工智能编码竞赛竞争对手的差距 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: SpaceX locks in $60 billion Cursor deal to close gap with rivals in AI coding race  ReutersSpaceX to acquire the AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion  CNBCSpaceX to buy AI coding firm Anysphere fo
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 锁定 600 亿美元的 Cursor 交易，以缩小与人工智能编码竞赛中竞争对手的差距 路透社 SpaceX 以 600 亿美元收购人工智能编码初创公司 Cursor CNBC SpaceX 收购人工智能编码公司 Anysphere

items.title_en: FBI says it disrupted alleged plot targeting UFC event at White House
items.title_zh: FBI 称其挫败了针对白宫 UFC 赛事的涉嫌阴谋
items.desc_en: FBI Director Kash Patel said multiple people are in custody after law enforcement disrupted an alleged plot targeting Sunday’s UFC event at the White House.
items.desc_zh: 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔表示，执法部门挫败了一项针对周日在白宫举行的 UFC 赛事的阴谋，多人被拘留。

items.title_en: France's oldest female detainee, 79, goes on trial for in-law's grisly murder
items.title_zh: 法国最年长女性被拘留者，79岁，因残忍谋杀姻亲而受审
items.desc_en: A dismembered body found in a chain-bound trunk in the Seine in 1995 was only recently connected to the defendant by DNA evidence.
items.desc_zh: 1995 年，在塞纳河的一个用链子捆住的箱子里发现了一具被肢解的尸体，直到最近才通过 DNA 证据将其与被告联系起来。

items.title_en: Somaliland opens Jerusalem embassy after Israel's recognition of its independence
items.title_zh: 以色列承认其独立后，索马里兰在耶路撒冷开设大使馆
items.desc_en: The move comes six months after Israel became the first country to recognise the breakaway East African state.
items.desc_zh: 六个月前，以色列成为第一个承认分离的东非国家的国家。

items.title_en: As Hormuz crisis eases, gas prices may drop—other costs like groceries and home goods could stay high for a while
items.title_zh: 随着霍尔木兹危机缓解，天然气价格可能会下降，杂货和家居用品等其他成本可能会在一段时间内保持高位
items.desc_en: Oil prices are falling after a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but broader relief from higher prices may take time.
items.desc_zh: 在重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的临时协议后，油价正在下跌，但油价上涨的全面缓解可能需要时间。

items.title_en: EchoStar is worth at least $161 a share because of SpaceX stake, says analyst
items.title_zh: 分析师称，由于持有 SpaceX 股份，EchoStar 每股价值至少 161 美元
items.desc_en: New Street Research raised its valuation of EchoStar to reflect its ownership of SpaceX, calling it an "attractive proposition"
items.desc_zh: New Street Research 提高了 EchoStar 的估值，以反映其对 SpaceX 的所有权，称其为“有吸引力的提议”

items.title_en: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
items.title_zh: 新油？将人工智能计算能力转变为可交易商品的努力
items.desc_en: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.
items.desc_zh: Silicon Data 的 Carmen Li 认为，人工智能计算未来最终可能会与世界上一些最大的商品市场相媲美。

items.title_zh: 特朗普暗示他可以向国会提交伊朗协议的细节 - CNBC

items.title_en: Algae thwarts Trump’s $14.2m attempt to turn reflecting pool ‘American flag blue’ - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 藻类阻碍了特朗普耗资 1420 万美元将倒影池变成“美国国旗蓝色”的尝试 - 英国《卫报》
items.desc_en: Algae thwarts Trump’s $14.2m attempt to turn reflecting pool ‘American flag blue’  The GuardianNational Park Service crews clear out algae from Reflecting Pool  WUSA9Workers Frantically Chuck Househol
items.desc_zh: 藻类阻碍了特朗普花费 1,420 万美元将倒影池变成“美国国旗蓝色”的尝试《卫报》国家公园管理局工作人员清除倒影池中的藻类 WUSA9 工人疯狂地查克·豪斯霍尔 (Chuck Househol)

items.title_en: SpaceX set to pass Amazon by market cap in third day of trading as stock rises 3%
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价将在第三个交易日上涨 3%，市值将超过亚马逊
items.desc_en: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030."
items.desc_zh: 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克周日表示，该公司“可能在 2030 年实现约 1 万亿美元的收入”。

items.title_en: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
items.title_zh: Carvana 正在扩展到新车领域。其影响可能重塑美国汽车零售市场
items.desc_en: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.
items.desc_zh: 自去年以来，Carvana 已购买了 7 个新车特许经营权，主要销售 Stellantis 的克莱斯勒、道奇、吉普和公羊品牌。

items.title_en: How AI may be messing with home prices
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何影响房价
items.desc_en: For most real estate professionals, the data aggregation capabilities of AI can enhance their expertise. But there are shortcomings.
items.desc_zh: 对于大多数房地产专业人士来说，人工智能的数据聚合能力可以增强他们的专业知识。但也有缺点。

items.title_en: Swedish man jailed for four years for coercing wife into sex with 120 men
items.title_zh: 瑞典男子强迫妻子与120名男子发生性关系，被判入狱四年
items.desc_en: The 61-year-old was found to have coerced his wife into sexual acts with men he found online in exchange for payment.
items.desc_zh: 这名 61 岁的男子被发现强迫妻子与他在网上找到的男子发生性行为，以换取报酬。

items.title_en: FBI thwarted plot targeting White House UFC event, Patel says
items.title_zh: 帕特尔称，联邦调查局挫败了针对白宫 UFC 赛事的阴谋
items.desc_en: US media say the plan would have involved a drone attack. The FBI boss says multiple suspects are in custody.
items.desc_zh: 美国媒体称，该计划将涉及无人机袭击。联邦调查局局长表示，多名嫌疑人已被拘留。

items.title_en: Hungary's MPs block return of Orbán, limiting rule of PM to eight years
items.title_zh: 匈牙利国会议员阻止欧尔班回归，将总理的任期限制为八年
items.desc_en: The vote fulfils a promise by new PM Péter Magyar to stop his predecessor from becoming prime minister again.
items.desc_zh: 这次投票兑现了新任总理彼得·马扎尔阻止其前任再次担任总理的承诺。

items.title_zh: 消息人士称，FBI 挫败了涉嫌使用载有爆炸物的无人机袭击白宫 UFC 赛事的阴谋 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Trump turns his attention to Ukraine ahead of Iran deal: 'I’m going to do whatever I can’
items.title_zh: 特朗普在伊朗协议前将注意力转向乌克兰：“我将尽我所能”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump said Tuesday that "Russia should make a deal" to end its four-year war in Ukraine.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周二表示，“俄罗斯应该达成协议”以结束乌克兰长达四年的战争。

items.title_en: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
items.desc_en: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: One dead, 4 injured after magnitude 6.3 earthquake in China's Qinghai - Reuters
items.title_zh: 中国青海发生6.3级地震 造成1人死亡4人受伤 - 路透中文网

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh's Fed is not expected to make any change to rates for a while, according to CNBC Fed Survey
items.title_zh: 根据 CNBC 美联储调查，凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 领导的美联储预计暂时不会对利率做出任何改变
items.desc_en: The survey respondents do expect the Fed at this week's meeting to remove the easing bias in the statement that has signaled the Fed's next move would likely be a cut.
items.desc_zh: 调查受访者确实预计美联储在本周的会议上将消除声明中的宽松偏见，该声明暗示美联储的下一步行动可能是降息。

items.title_en: Cuba tourism collapses as US pressure campaign bites
items.title_zh: 由于美国施压行动的影响，古巴旅游业崩溃
items.desc_en: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.
items.desc_zh: 古巴官员表示，由于制裁和有效的石油封锁，外国游客数量比去年减少了 58%。

items.title_zh: 洪水泛滥的热带扰动可能很快就会淹没南部部分地区 - 《华盛顿邮报》

items.title_en: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯艺术家和普京评论家在波兰被枪杀
items.desc_en: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.desc_zh: 罗伯特·库佐夫科夫（Robert Kuzovkov）使用笔名谢苗·斯克雷佩茨基（Semyon Skrepetsky），因其对弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）等政客的漫画而闻名。

items.title_zh: 印度因试卷泄露问题暂时禁止 Telegram
items.desc_en: The NEET exam had earlier been scrapped over allegations of a paper leak, sparking massive protests.
items.desc_zh: NEET 考试早些时候因试卷泄露指控而被取消，引发了大规模抗议。

items.title_zh: 尼日利亚军队释放在囚禁中死亡的前将军遗孀
items.desc_en: Maj Gen Rabe Abubakar and his wife Amina were abducted in north-west Nigeria at the end of last month.
items.desc_zh: 拉贝·阿布巴卡尔少将和他的妻子阿米娜上个月底在尼日利亚西北部被绑架。

items.desc_zh: 由于伊朗和平协议在法国七国集团会议上占据主导地位，周二全球油价跌至三个月低点。

items.title_zh: 印度教科书在强烈反对后恢复了“舞女”裸露的躯干

items.title_zh: 伊朗协议给内塔尼亚胡带来了政治噩梦
items.desc_en: Donald Trump's ceasefire agreement with Iran leaves the Israeli PM trapped in a new political and security dilemma.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普与伊朗的停火协议使以色列总理陷入了新的政治和安全困境。

items.title_en: Eight dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California
items.title_zh: 美国空军 B-52 轰炸机在加利福尼亚州坠毁，八人死亡
items.desc_en: The Boeing B-52 Stratofortress has been used by the US military since the 1950s.
items.desc_zh: 波音 B-52 Stratofortress 自 20 世纪 50 年代以来一直被美国军方使用。

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.title_en: Married at First Sight Australia allegations 'disturbing', says country's watchdog
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚监管机构表示，澳大利亚一见钟情的指控“令人不安”
items.desc_en: The claims also prompted a response from UK media regulator Ofcom, who called them "deeply concerning".
items.desc_zh: 这些说法还引起了英国媒体监管机构 Ofcom 的回应，称这些说法“令人深感担忧”。

items.title_en: California's Gavin Newsom alleges justice department is investigating his wife and ex-staff
items.title_zh: 加州州长加文·纽瑟姆声称司法部正在调查他的妻子和前工作人员
items.desc_en: A source familiar with the investigations says they had been ongoing for "roughly a year".
items.desc_zh: 一位熟悉调查的消息人士称，调查已经持续了“大约一年”。

items.title_en: Some of the skydivers killed in Missouri plane crash were experienced jumpers - PBS

items.desc_en: Some of the skydivers killed in Missouri plane crash were experienced jumpers  PBSMissouri plane crash kills 12 people in one of the deadliest US skydiving incidents in decades  CNNFriends remember 12
items.desc_zh: 在密苏里州空难中丧生的一些跳伞员都是经验丰富的跳伞者 PBS 密苏里州空难造成 12 人死亡，这是美国几十年来最致命的跳伞事件之一 CNN 朋友记得 12

items.title_en: Stock futures are little changed after Dow posts new record close on potential U.S.-Iran peace deal: Live updates

items.desc_en: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed to new intraday and closing records on a potential peace deal between the U.S. and Iran.
items.desc_zh: 周一，道琼斯工业平均指数攀升至新的盘中和收盘纪录，因美国和伊朗之间可能达成和平协议。
